hooks.command: node -e "const cmd=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT||''; const bad=[/rm\s+-rf\s+\//, /git\s+push\s+--force/, /git\s+push\s+-f\b/, /:\(\)\s*\{/, /sudo\s+/, /mkfs/, /dd\s+if=/]; if(bad.some(r=>r.test(cmd))){console.error('Blocked dangerous command: '+cmd); process.exit(2);}"
echo '⚠️  Claude 已停止，运行 git status / git diff 后再决定是否提交。'
